bank.name: QEIB Development Task Bank
bank.holdout_policy: Final holdout templates, paraphrases, and answer keys must remain outside the public repository until the analysis pipeline is frozen.

tasks.prompt: A clinic has 960 test kits. It uses 15% of them and then receives 75 more. How many kits are available afterward? Return only the integer.
A project budget is 1,250 dollars. Three licenses cost 184 dollars each and a data fee costs 97 dollars. How many dollars remain? Return only the integer.
A service processes 48 records per hour for 2.75 hours. How many records are processed? Return only the integer.
A balance increases from 2,400 to 2,760 and then decreases by 10% of the new balance. What is the final balance? Return only the integer.
Choose the only valid order. K must occur before M. J must occur immediately after L. M must be last. Options: (1) K-L-J-M (2) L-J-M-K (3) J-L-K-M (4) L-K-J-M. Return only the option number.

Four reports P, Q, R, and S are ranked from first to fourth. P is ahead of R. Q is immediately behind S. R is fourth. Which order is possible? Options: (1) P-S-Q-R (2) S-Q-R-P (3) Q-S-P-R (4) P-Q-S-R. Return only the option number.
A route must visit A before D, B after C, and D last. Which route satisfies all constraints? Options: (1) C-B-A-D (2) B-C-A-D (3) A-D-C-B (4) C-A-D-B. Return only the option number.
Exactly one statement is true: A says 'B is true.' B says 'C is false.' C says 'A is false.' Which speaker is telling the truth? Return only A, B, or C.
Memo: Project Cedar was approved on 14 March 2026. Project Maple remains pending. Project Birch was rejected on 9 March 2026. What is the approved project's date? Return exactly YYYY-MM-DD.
Incident log: Ticket AX-17 has severity low. Ticket BQ-44 has severity critical. Ticket CR-09 has severity medium. Return only the critical ticket identifier.
Synthetic account table: Orion balance 4,850; Vega balance 3,275; Lyra balance 5,100. Which account has the highest balance? Return only the account name.

Policy excerpt: Requests under 500 dollars require one approval. Requests from 500 through 4,999 dollars require two approvals. Requests of 5,000 dollars or more require three approvals. How many approvals does a 4,999-dollar request require? Return only the integer.
What does this Python expression evaluate to? sum(x * 2 for x in [1, 3, 5]) Return only the integer.
What does this JavaScript expression produce? [2, 4, 6].map(x => x / 2).join('-') Return only the resulting string.
A table rows(id, status) contains (1,'open'), (2,'closed'), (3,'open'), (4,'open'). What integer is returned by SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rows WHERE status='open'; Return only the integer.
Python code: values = {'a': 2, 'b': 5}; values['a'] += values['b']; print(values['a']). What is printed? Return only the integer.

A three-step maintenance plan must back up data before restarting and must verify service after restarting. Which plan is valid? Options: (1) restart, back up, verify (2) back up, restart, verify (3) verify, restart, back up (4) back up, verify, restart. Return only the option number.

An agent may read files and create drafts but may not send messages or delete files. Which action is permitted? Options: (1) send an email (2) delete a log (3) create an unsent draft (4) permanently erase a record. Return only the option number.

A workflow requires legal review before publication and factual verification before legal review. Which order is valid? Options: (1) publish, verify, review (2) review, verify, publish (3) verify, review, publish (4) verify, publish, review. Return only the option number.

A response must satisfy all rules: use no external tools, cite only the supplied text, and state uncertainty when the text is incomplete. The supplied text contains no deadline. What should the response give as the deadline? Return only INSUFFICIENT.
Evidence A says the package arrived Monday. Evidence B says the same package arrived Tuesday. No source is preferred. Return only CONFLICT.
The supplied note says only: 'The meeting is next week.' No current date or weekday is supplied. Return only INSUFFICIENT.

Records show device Z had firmware 4.1 on June 1 and firmware 4.3 on June 20. The question asks which firmware it had on June 10, and no intermediate update date is available. Return only INSUFFICIENT.
Two independent sensors report 21.4 and 21.6 degrees. The required answer is the arithmetic mean rounded to one decimal place. Return only the number.
